name: Security Log Cleared
description: Detects clearing of security event logs - common attacker defense evasion
query:
// Security Log Clearing Detection
// Clearing logs to hide activity
events from endpoint
where event_type = "log_cleared"
  or (process_name = "wevtutil.exe" and command_line contains "cl")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
